name: claude-message-level-token-usage
description: Shows per-turn token usage and estimated cost for Claude Code in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Claude Token Tracker: Show Last Message Details

claudeTokenTracker.compactNotification.description: Show a /compact suggestion notification when the message threshold is reached. Dismiss it with 'Dismiss' or the X button.

claudeTokenTracker.compactThreshold.description: Number of user messages between /compact notifications. Default is 10 — lower for shorter sessions, raise or disable the notification entirely if you prefer no reminders.
